name: SpaceX Launches
description: Find the 3 most recent SpaceX launches and write the results to a file

tasks.name: Search for SpaceX launches
tasks.description: Search the web for the 3 most recent SpaceX launches

tasks.name: Extract launch information
tasks.description: Extract the mission name, date, and success status from the search results
tasks.success_criteria: Extracted launch information for at least 3 launches

tasks.name: Write launch information to file
tasks.description: Write the extracted launch information to a file called spacex_launches.txt
tasks.success_criteria: File spacex_launches.txt contains launch information for at least 3 launches
